personal.preferred_title: Data Analyst / Reporting & Data Validation Engineer

summary: Data and reporting professional with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong hands-on SQL, Python, data validation, reporting automation, and operational support background. Experienced supporting business stakeholders with reliable reporting deliverables, root-cause analysis, workflow monitoring, data quality checks, and well-documented processes in regulated financial-services environments. Brings AWS data-platform exposure, ETL/data warehousing concepts, Git-based development practices, and a practical service mindset for remote report delivery and stakeholder support roles.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Supported enterprise reporting and analytics consumers by building Python, Pandas, and SQL-driven data pipelines that converted operational telemetry into reliable stakeholder-ready outputs.
Performed recurring data validation, quality checks, anomaly review, and root-cause analysis across large datasets to ensure reporting accuracy, consistency, and operational trust.
Maintained production reporting workflows, monitored process health, investigated exceptions, and escalated risks or data issues before they affected business-facing deliverables.
Partnered with technical and non-technical stakeholders to clarify reporting needs, refine data definitions, document workflows, and improve repeatable delivery processes.
Used AWS services including S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift in data-platform modernization work, with Python automation supporting data loading, validation, and analytics workflows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer / Data Analytics Engineer
bullets: Analyzed user-performance and operational data to identify trends, anomalies, and improvement opportunities for critical business systems.
Built reporting and dashboard-style outputs from monitoring data, helping engineering and business teams understand system health, performance patterns, and customer-impacting issues.
Collaborated with stakeholders to validate reporting logic, interpret data results, and turn raw system data into actionable recommendations.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Created automated reporting extracts and operational dashboards using Perl, Ksh, SQL, and monitoring data to replace manual weekly reporting activities.
Supported production issue analysis by correlating system behavior, application metrics, thresholds, and stakeholder-reported symptoms into clear findings.
Produced technical documentation, runbooks, and process guidance adopted by client teams for repeatable monitoring, reporting, and support workflows.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Supported large-scale data migration and validation from distributed MySQL systems to Oracle RAC, emphasizing data correctness, repeatable testing, and performance reliability.
Built validation routines and testing support in C++/OCCI/OCI to confirm migration accuracy and identify data or process defects before production cutover.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Analysis & Reporting: Data validation, reporting operations, exploratory analysis, trend/anomaly review, stakeholder reporting, ad hoc data requests, workflow health monitoring
skills.Languages & Querying: SQL, Python, PL/SQL, Pandas, Perl, Korn Shell scripting
skills.Data Quality & Validation: Quality checks, reconciliation, completeness and consistency checks, root-cause analysis, data integrity review, production issue investigation
skills.Cloud & Data Concepts: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, ETL/ELT concepts, data warehousing, data modeling, large dataset processing
skills.Reporting & Visualization: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, operational dashboards, stakeholder reports; Tableau concepts and transferable BI reporting experience
skills.Delivery & Collaboration: Git, documentation, Agile/Scrum exposure, technical runbooks, support workflows, cross-functional communication, production support

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based workflow that scores job postings, validates structured outputs, generates resume and cover artifacts, and tracks application status using repeatable quality gates and JSON contracts.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting and Reporting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark analytics and reporting workflow for large-scale telemetry, including validation, trend analysis, forecasting outputs, and stakeholder-facing dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed AWS data-platform patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Python/PySpark concepts to support scalable ingestion, validation, and analytics workflows.
